titleStmt.title: Letter from Frank Dillon to Thomas F. Delaney, 11 April 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Frank Dillon

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from Frank Dillon of M Dillon & Son Stock Brokers, to Thomas Delaney with two tickets (not included) for the Phoenix Park Races the following Saturday (April 15). Frank Dillon also wonders whether Delaney (who worked for the Grand Canal Company) would be able to secure him some petrol or retinol soon. Also enclosed with the letter is a photograph, presumably of the letter writer, taken in M Lennon, Portobello Studio, 13 South Richmond Street, Dublin.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
TELEPHONE No 1481 TELEGRAPHIC ADDRESS 'INVESTOR' DUBLIN M. DILLON & SON, STOCK BROKERS. 3, Trinity Street Dublin 11th April 1916 Dear Mr Delany I send you 2 passes
for Phoenix on Saturday.
One for yourself and
one for Mr Menzies.
No doubt you will try
to get me a supply of
petrol before long. Yours Sincerely Frank Dillon
Thos. Delany Eq Grand Cn. James St.
M. Lennon Portobello Studio 13, South Richmond St Dublin
To Thomas Delaney Eq Secy Grand Canal James St. Warehouse Dublin
